action.reasoning: Observation: The previous agent ran 7 iterations but the history is truncated. The best accuracy achieved was 0.7432 with a ConvNeXt-Tiny model. Analysis: The dataset has 40% noise. ViT-B/16 with Mixup, CutMix, and EMA is highly robust to label noise and should significantly outperform the baseline. Decision: I will rewrite `train.py` to train a ViT-B/16 model with Mixup and EMA for 5 epochs, and `predict.py` to match. I will submit an evaluation immediately to measure the test accuracy and iteration time.
